description: parse_app_usage returns records from a synthetic SRUDB.dat
steps: Build a minimal synthetic ESE database containing one AppUsage leaf page with 2 encoded records
Verify exactly 2 AppUsageRecord values are in the Vec
Verify foreground_cycles and background_cycles match the encoded values

description: AppUsageRecord timestamp parses from Windows FILETIME encoding
steps: Encode a record with a known Windows FILETIME value representing 2024-06-15T08:00:00Z
Call parse_app_usage and inspect the timestamp
